tasks.title: Implement Improvement 1: ATR-based risk-targeted position sizing
Fix MTM equity bug + remove rfD-on-idle masking kludge
tasks.notes: VERIFIED end-to-end on local C:\ mirror. backtest:matrix POST-MTM (10y window, 13 instruments via warehouse): ann_ret +0.55% (was -0.27%), Sharpe -1.948 (was -6.264), Sortino -2.265 (was -5.093), maxDD 19.9% (was 10.6%, now realistic), winRate 44.1% (was 50.9%, lower because MTM circuit breaker now correctly fires on real losing trades). vitest 82/82 PASS. Sharpe improved 4×, all metrics now mathematically consistent. Strategy still below A1/B3 staging gates but on an honest foundation.

tasks.title: Fix 4 pre-existing typecheck errors blocking CI
tasks.notes: 1) Skeleton.tsx: added `style?: React.CSSProperties` to props (was used by SkeletonTable but missing from interface). 2) strategyConfig.ts toBacktestConfig: added 3 Phase-3 breakout fields to literal (enableBreakoutEntry, breakoutMinPullbackPct, breakoutMaxPullbackPct). 3) alpha-vs-spy.ts: replaced phantom `strat.dailyReturns` with averaged per-instrument dailyReturns (the original was reading undefined → IR was always null; this is a real bug fix, not just a type fix). 4) phase2-optimizer.ts: `t.pnl` → `t.pnlPct` (Trade has pnlPct, not pnl; win-rate calc was always 0). After all 4 fixes: tsc --noEmit returns 0 errors (was 4). vitest 82/82 still PASS.

tasks.title: Autonomous 5-hour wave loop with expert cross-checks + DeepSeek provider enablement
tasks.notes: Added unattended `loop:autonomous` runner that continuously executes mission + optimization cycles, computes multi-role expert review notes (quant reviewer, risk auditor, PM critic, performance optimizer, safety guard), and writes structured cycle reports to artifacts/autonomous-wave. Added DeepSeek provider defaults (`deepseek-v4-pro`, `deepseek-chat`) to trading-agents config so UI/API can run DeepSeek-backed workflows. A/B blocked by this checkout's node_modules/execution-policy issues.

blockers.title: Google Drive node_modules corruption blocks toolchain (workaround in place)
blockers.detail: 1134 of 1157 package.json files in node_modules on G:\ are 0-byte placeholders (selective-sync). Workaround: project mirrored to C:\Users\wang haoheng\AppData\Local\quantan-work with full deps installed. Toolchain (tsc/tsx/vitest) now runs cleanly there. Edits should be applied to G:\ source then `cp` synced to mirror for verification (or work in mirror and sync back). Permanent fix: user toggles G:\node_modules to 'Available offline' in Drive, or works directly from a non-Drive checkout.
